## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally: `python -m unittest discover -v tests`
- [ ] Lint & security clean: `ruff check .` and
      `bandit -r pqcprobe.py -c pyproject.toml --severity-level medium`
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (README / CHANGELOG) if the change is user-facing
- [ ] For a notable design decision, added an entry to `docs/DECISIONS.md`
